prompt: A customer imported 48k contacts on Friday and the UI said 'import completed cleanly' — then on Monday they filed a ticket asking where 1,200 of their contacts went. The rows really are bad in their export file (fine, we skip those on purpose), but ImportAll is supposed to hand back the parse problem so the caller shows a warning, and callers are getting a nil error every single time no matter how much garbage is in the file. The skipping works, the counting works, the reporting just... never happens. It's got to be in importer.go. Fix it — importer_test.go must stay untouched — and verify with `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...`.
